title: 9 in 1 Silicone Caulking Tools, Silicone Sealant Tool with Narrow Tips, Sealant Finishing Tool for Small Tighter Spaces
features: High Auality Materials: The silicone applicator tool is made of high-quality plastic and silicone, ensuring durability, excellent flexibility, and wear resistance. Sealant tool can be used for filling joints in both small spaces and large surfaces

9-in-1 Design: The Silicone tool set includes 9 different specifications of interchangeable heads, making it easy to adapt to various joint filling tasks, such as gap sealing, kitchen and bathroom detail processing, etc

Anti Slip Handle: The ergonomic handle design of the silicone smoothing tool provides a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue even during extended use, while the anti-slip feature enhances stability and control for a smoother filling process

Widely Applicable: Silicone finishing tool suitable for various scenarios such as home maintenance, professional construction projects, etc., whether it is kitchen, bathroom, window, it can meet your filling needs

Easy to Clean and Store: After using the caulking tool kit, simply rinse the tip. The compact and compact design makes it easy to store in a toolbox or drawer, keeping your workspace tidy and organized for easy access
